use_cases: Visualizing conversion funnels for incident management workflows
Tracking event-to-resolution pipelines in monitoring dashboards
Displaying alert triage and escalation processes
Analyzing user journey drop-off points in SaaS applications
Showing data filtering stages for DevOps and monitoring tools
ai_summary: A reaviz-based funnel chart component displaying a conversion flow from 1000 events through alerts, incidents, escalation, and resolution stages. Features glass-morphism styling with smooth framer-motion animations and interactive tooltips. Optimized for incident response workflows, monitoring dashboards, and SaaS analytics where tracking event drop-off rates is critical.
